title: #getsaasy with monday.com: Unlock efficiency with monday CRM for Sales & monday Service for ITSM!
excerpt: Ready to transform your workplace and boost your results? Imagine skyrocketing sales and thriving IT, HR, Marketing & Ops support teams. Join us 29th April at 2:30pm for an immersive event and #getsaasy with monday.com a…

posts.author: BeckyRichards (Becky Richards)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ready to transform your workplace and boost your results? Imagine skyrocketing sales and thriving IT, HR, Marketing & Ops support teams. Join us 29th April at 2:30pm for an immersive event and #getsaasy with monday.com and its game-changing sales and service solutions.

Do you work in: Operations, Sales, Marketing, IT, or HR? Then this event is a MUST!

Agenda:

2:30 PM: Arrival Drinks

3:00 PM: Unleash Your Talent with monday CRM

4:30 PM: Effortless Service Excellence ft. monday service

What to Expect:

  • Live demos of monday CRM and monday Service
  • See the very latest new features and updates for CRM & Service
  • Q&A session with our certified Experts
  • Networking opportunities
  • Drinks & canapés
  • Exclusive extended free one-month trial on a monday.com product of your choice*

Don’t miss this chance to take your business to the next level! We look forward to seeing you at Marco Pierre White’s, The Cube, Birmingham.

Register here - #getsaasy with monday.com Tickets, Tue, Apr 29, 2025 at 2:00 PM | Eventbrite
